blocks.content: Codify corporate standards using Rules, and automate repetitive tasks using Workflows to scale your productivity.

items.title: Rules (Always-On)
items.content: Rules dictate how an agent behaves globally in the background without needing to be prompted every time.

items.title: Workflows (On-Demand)
items.content: Workflows are slash-commands (e.g. `/test`) you trigger manually for specific, complex repetitive tasks.

blocks.content: Create the hidden directory and a rule file in your terminal:

mkdir -p .agents/rules

cat << 'EOF' > .agents/rules/style.md
Always prepend the text `# Copyright 2026 Tridorian` as a comment at the top of any new source file you generate.
EOF
Create a custom slash-command to generate tests automatically:

mkdir -p .agents/workflows

cat << 'EOF' > .agents/workflows/generate-tests.md
Analyze the active file and generate a comprehensive suite of unit tests using `pytest`. Save them in a `tests/` directory.
EOF

blocks.title: Test it Out!
blocks.content: Open the Agent Manager. Type `/generate-tests` in the chat. The agent will read your workflow prompt, generate the tests for your active file, AND automatically apply the Copyright header based on your global Rule!
